content: Both 2024–2025 and deep 2025 SOTA active learning agent memory systems share an unrecognized core constraint: their iterative search for high-value unlabeled data to add to memory is bottlenecked by the same 'recency-curiosity overfitting' problem, where agents only prioritize novel recent experiences and systematically discard rare, long-horizon edge cases that drive generalization to out-of-distribution tasks.
source_topics: active learning memory agent SOTA deep 2025
